mapper.sql: notice_id, title, content, pinned, published_at, created_by_user_id, updated_by_user_id, created_at, updated_at

deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( LOWER(title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{request.keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{request.keyword}), '%') )
AND pinned = TRUE

ORDER BY pinned DESC,
created_at DESC,
published_at DESC,
notice_id DESC
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notices WHERE
AND published_at <= #{now}

SELECT
FROM notices WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices ( title, content, pinned, published_at, created_by_user_id, updated_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{pinned}, #{publishedAt}, #{actorUserId}, #{actorUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE notices SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, pinned = #{pinned}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_by_user_id = #{actorUserId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE notices SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
